det_check_template:
proof fn det_pop_unique<T: Copy, const N: usize>(pre_self_: ArrayVec<T, N>, post1_self_: ArrayVec<T, N>, r1: &T, post2_self_: ArrayVec<T, N>, r2: &T)
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_@.len() > 0), (pre_self_@.no_duplicates()),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_@.len() == pre_self_@.len() - 1)
            &&& (r1 == pre_self_@[pre_self_.len() - 1])
            &&& (post1_self_@ =~= pre_self_@.drop_last())
            &&& (post1_self_@.no_duplicates())
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_@.len() == pre_self_@.len() - 1)
            &&& (r2 == pre_self_@[pre_self_.len() - 1])
            &&& (post2_self_@ =~= pre_self_@.drop_last())
            &&& (post2_self_@.no_duplicates())
        }) ==> det_pop_unique_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
